steps.title: Trace Montero's career phases
steps.content: The text opens with a broad statement that Montero's career had distinct phases. It then describes early projects combining traditional Mexican techniques with Mediterranean designs, before shifting to later modernist and functionalist work prompted by travel.

steps.title: Reject single-theme readings
steps.content: B treats the passage as commitment to one aesthetic, but the text emphasizes change. C invents original and lesser-known sources of inspiration. D adds heritage influence and career impact, which the passage does not discuss. The answer is A.
